title: Office of Inspector General
text:
NASA’s Mission Support Future Architecture Program
Since 2017, NASA has been working to streamline the critical support services that enable bold missions on Earth and beyond. However, our new report found that this initiative remains incomplete and lacks metrics to measure success.
Read More
Report to Congress
Our Semiannual Report details how we’re improving efficiency at NASA and combatting foreign influence.
Read More
NASA’s Top Challenges
What issues could hinder NASA’s mission success? We’ve identified the 5 most critical challenges facing the Agency—including returning humans to the Moon, managing cybersecurity risks, and more.

Examining NASA's Aging Spacesuit Design
The spacesuits that astronauts wear during spacewalks were designed more than 50 years ago. Today, their advanced age is causing difficulties as NASA races to develop next-generation suits to replace them.
